Hello, I'm Ivans!

About Me

Render EngineeringOptimizationsGraphics Programming

Ivans Minajevs

I am graphics and optimizations programmer from Latvia 🇱🇻

Throughout my studies and career I have always been interested in complex, difficult and large-scale tasks or projects.

I see programming as a LEGO set 🧩, where final image is given, but there is no guideline. So instead you apply creativity to get to desired result, which is exactly what I enjoy doing the most.

Projects

Forefront

Battlefield-inspired VR shooter

Salamander

Real-time rendering engine with Vulkan API

Mesh Area Lights

Research of sampling techniques

Software Raytracer

Software raytracer with C++

Dual Rasterizer

Software and hardware (DirectX) rasterizer

Reel or nothing!

Physics programming for group project

Nocturne Engine and Q*bert

Game engine with retro game example
